version="26.0.16"> <diagram id="scheme-gen" name="ProcessStudentGrades"> <mxGraphModel dx="2836" dy="1347" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="start_node" value="НАЧАЛО" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="100" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="input_data" value="grades, n" style="shape=parallelogram;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fixedSize=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="220" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="check_empty" value="n <= 0" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="302" y="340" width="196" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="init_vars" value="passed_count = 0<br>i = 0<br>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="178.75" y="472" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err_empty" value="Exception: No students data" style="shape=parallelogram;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fixedSize=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="378.75" y="487" width="242.5" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop_node" value="i = 0, n - 1" style="shape=hexagon;perimeter=hexagonPerimeter2;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fixedSize=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="316" y="622" width="168" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="func_call" value="normalized = apply_curve(grades<sub>i</sub>)" style="shape=process;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="245" y="742" width="310" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="check_pass" value="normalized >= 50" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="288" y="862" width="224" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="update_stats" value="passed_count = passed_count + 1<br>grades<sub>i</sub> = normalized<br>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="263.75" y="994" width="272.5" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="check_any_passed" value="passed_count > 0" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="288" y="1144" width="224" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="out_success" value="grades, passed_count" style="shape=parallelogram;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fixedSize=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="152.5" y="1276" width="190" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err_all_failed" value="Exception: All students failed" style="shape=parallelogram;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fixedSize=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="382.5" y="1276" width="265" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="end_node" value="КОНЕЦ" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330"
